description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the built‑in Security/SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template. Add a sast job that runs the default SAST scanning commands from the template and set the variable SAST_EXCLUDED_PATHS to cloud,docker,docs,model,scripts,tests to exclude those directories. Define a nodejs-scan-sast job but disable it entirely by adding a rule with when: never. The pipeline relies on the template's default stages and artifacts.
